title: April 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 28''' is the 118th day of the year (119th in leap years). There are 247 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1999]] – [[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 4|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 4]] published.
*1999 – [[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 2|''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 2]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back 4|''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 4]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 64|''Republic'' 64]] published.
*[[2006]] – "[[A Certain Point of View (short story)|A Certain Point of View]]" republished on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2007]] – [[Ronnie Phillips]] dies.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars Insider 109|''Star Wars Insider'' 109]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion Volume 1—Refugees]]'' published.
*2010 – [[Legacy (2006) 47|''Legacy'' (2006) 47]] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Lords of the Sith]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Ultimate Star Wars]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Vader's Secret Missions]]'' published.
*2015 – [[Rescue from Jabba's Palace (World of Reading)|''Rescue from Jabba's Palace'']] published.
*2015 – ''[[Darth Vader and Friends]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 11|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 11]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back – The 40th Anniversary Covers by Chris Sprouse 1|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back – The 40th Anniversary Covers by Chris Sprouse'' 1]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Neal Adams]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Survivor]]'' released.
*2023 – [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] to be released for a limited run in theaters for the film's 40th anniversary.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon (trade paperback)]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Dad Jokes Strikes Back]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Drinks]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Guided Journal]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Ultimate Sticker Collection]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Grogu's Adventures]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Where I Go, He Goes]]'' to be published.
